mapper.update:
update cm_order_shopping set deleted = '1' where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select distinct cos.id as orderId, cp.merchant_id, cos.payment_type, cos.real_price, cp.shelve_area from cm_order_shopping cos left join cm_order_logistics col on cos.order_no = col.shopping_order_no left join cm_order_products cop on cos.id = cop.order_id left join cm_product_sku cps on cop.sku_id = cps.id left join cm_product cp on cps.product_id = cp.id where cos.deleted = '0' and cos.state = '2' and cos.payment_state = '3' and cos.settlement_state = 0 and col.create_time < #{offsetTime}

select distinct cos.id as orderId, cp.merchant_id, cos.payment_type, cos.real_price, cp.shelve_area from cm_order_shopping cos left join cm_order_products cop on cos.id = cop.order_id left join cm_product_sku cps on cop.sku_id = cps.id left join cm_product cp on cps.product_id = cp.id where cos.deleted = '0' and cos.state = '3' and cos.payment_state = '3' and cos.settlement_state = '0' and cos.update_time < #{offsetTime}
mapper.update: update cm_order_shopping set state = '3', payment_state = '3', settlement_state = '1', settlement_amount = #{amount} where id = #{id}
